source.inspired_by: Classic ERC4626 / first-depositor inflation attack (early vaults without virtual shares)

ground_truth.description: Shares are minted pro-rata against live totalAssets() with no virtual-shares / dead-shares offset. The first depositor mints 1 share, donates assets directly to inflate the share price, and a later deposit rounds down to zero shares, letting the attacker redeem and capture the victim's assets.
